title: FuzzPack
description: A mod pack designed for and by furries to allow creativity in so many different ways including full player customizability and pixel by pixel sculpting of the world.
body:
I noticed that there was no mod packs that brought out the best mods for Furries to be their creative and expressive self, the main highlights of this mod pack are **Customizable Player Models & Bits and Chisels** alongside some fun quality of life and cute mods. This modpack is not meant to be a difficult or one of a kind experience, it's meant to just bring everything that a furry could want into minecraft. 

[ComplimentaryShaders](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/) is included so if you find yourself struggling performance wise, free to turn that off. *Tip: Shaders can be turned off **while in a world** by **pressing "K"** on your keyboard.*
